componentDescription: A customizable checkbox input for selecting options with various states and styling.

icon.description: Custom icon to display when the checkbox is in a checked state.

error.description: Indicates an error state or provides an error message for the checkbox.

name.description: Name attribute for the checkbox input.

label.description: Text label associated with the checkbox.

isChecked.description: Controls the checked state of the checkbox.

defaultIsSelected.description: Specifies the initial selected state of the checkbox.

isReadOnly.description: If true, the checkbox state cannot be changed by user interaction.

isDisabled.description: If true, the checkbox is disabled and unclickable.

isIndeterminate.description: If true, the checkbox displays an indeterminate state icon.

labelPosition.description: Position of the label relative to the checkbox.

onChange.description: Callback function triggered when the checkbox state changes.

onValueChange.description: Callback function triggered when the checkbox value changes.

views.description: Custom styles for different parts of the checkbox component (checkbox, label, infoText).

size.description: Defines the size of the checkbox component.

shadow.description: Shadow or elevation styling for the checkbox.

infoText.description: Supplementary text displayed below the label.
